---
title: "compilation of my academic and personal writing"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  categories: false
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

I aim to publish at least one post every two weeks. If you find a post helpful, please like or comment so I know what resonates. Most posts will cover technical concepts, though I occasionally like to delve into my philosophical interests.
